deliverables.title: Fix /api/add reserved-metadata rejection → INPUT_INVALID/400 (not 5xx retry-storm)
deliverables.notes: PR #89 squash-merged at 817b083 (spun off from D3.1's deferred wart; independent of the D3 arc). Surgical, 2 source files. Root cause deeper than the static diagnosis: ReservedMetadataFieldError carried no stable code → tagRetryable defaulted retryable:true → withRetry retried an unfixable bad request 4x (~800ms) then re-wrapped as UPSTREAM_FAILURE — the reported '500' was actually a 502. Also found: withRetry (retry.mjs) re-wraps every thrown error as UPSTREAM_FAILURE with original in .cause. Fix: ReservedMetadataFieldError self-describes code:'INPUT_INVALID' + retryable:false (matches sibling validators; kills the retry storm); /api/add unwraps withRetry .cause and maps INPUT_INVALID→400 via existing errorResponse/httpStatusFor, non-INPUT_INVALID rethrown untouched (zero collateral). TDD RED 502/792ms → GREEN 400/6ms; regression pin in error-shape.test.mjs uses systemMigration (decoupled from D3.1 status fields). Forward-compatible with D3.1 smoke Task6 Case B; CI green (build+smoke+installers) re-verified on the post-#90 base. Bug-fix per the automated-engineering-flow carve-out (CI-green + self-read).

deliverables.title: lockdir transient Windows mkdir-error hardening (rescued orphan → shipped)
deliverables.notes: PR #98 squash-merged @437544e (bugfix/hardening carve-out). The orphaned lockdir fix flagged in scrap-branch-cleanup (handoff item 4), rescued from its spawn_task and shipped as its own scoped change. Root cause: acquireLockdir treated any non-EEXIST mkdir error as fatal (throw e); on Windows, mkdir racing the prev holder's rmdir returns EPERM/EACCES/EBUSY (dir pending-delete or under a Defender/indexer sharing scan) and EMFILE/ENFILE = fd exhaustion under heavy concurrency — all transient, so the old code spuriously failed acquisition under concurrent churn (NOT flock-safe). Latent because CI is Linux-only (these don't occur there); maintainer develops on Windows 11. Fix: RETRYABLE_MKDIR_ERRS={EPERM,EACCES,EBUSY,EMFILE,ENFILE} retried within timeoutMs like EEXIST contention; a persistent one bottoms out at the timeout; everything else (ENOSPC/ENOENT/ENAMETOOLONG/EROFS/non-Error) still throws loud; EEXIST stale-detection (adaptive threshold + inode-compare guard) byte-for-byte unchanged, nested under if(e?.code==='EEXIST'). New opts.mkdirStub DI seam mirrors opts.statvfsStub. TDD: 5 stub-injected unit tests (EPERM retry→acquire; EBUSY persistent→timeout-false-never-throw; ENOSPC→throws; transient→EEXIST interleaving; timeoutMs:0+transient→false-after-one-attempt). Reviews (all clean): paired-Opus correctness+test-quality SHIP-WITH-NITS → multi-round adversarial code-review-loop (9 lenses: correctness/security/concurrency/error-handling/adversarial-impl/test-quality/api/maintainability/yagni) CONVERGED SHIP/0-blockers → dedicated security-review NO findings (security-neutral); NITs applied (e?.code non-Error guard, timeoutMs:0 pinning test, contract-comment trim), audit trail .claude/reviews/code-lockdir-transient-mkdir-retry-2026-06-03/log.md. 2 commits (e51d3b9 fix + a239679 loop follow-ups) squashed. Suite 844/0; CI green (build+smoke+installers) on both pushes. Behavioral note: checkpoint state.md (timeoutMs:0) now maps a transient FS hiccup to retryable checkpoint_in_progress instead of lock_acquire_failed — the correct signal for a momentary race; a persistent perms fault is caught earlier by the call-site parent-dir mkdir. No other caller distinguishes the two.

On tag: arc → done. ::: v1.3.0 RELEASED 2026-06-11 — #106 (live smoke probe) merged @2c2d203; annotated tag v1.3.0 pushed on 2c2d203 → release.yml built+pushed GHCR :1.3.0/:1.3/:latest (multi-arch amd64+arm64); GH release "v1.3.0 — lane classifier ON by default" created + marked Latest. deliverables.title: Gap-3 (#72 Gap 3) — OAuth-first vendor connectors (PWA cut at the Phase-0 gate)
deliverables.notes: Design-stage arc opened 2026-06-11 after the v1.3.0 release; user chose Gap 3 (biggest 'any device' gap) over Gap 4. Brainstorm (superpowers flow) settled: target = everyone by design, staged delivery (self-hosting operators first; hosted tier stays Gap 4); jobs = capture + recall equal; reachability = um-tunnel happy path; offline = capture outbox only (recall online-only, no vault data at rest on phone); approach A = PWA served by the UM server at /app (no-build vanilla ES modules, ships in Docker image, UM_APP_ENABLED opt-out, Capacitor-wrappable; B hosted-SPA and C native rejected — CORS/token-trust and app-store lift). Key design points preserved in the spec: unauthenticated static shell + bearer API calls; QR pairing via URL FRAGMENT (token never hits server/tunnel logs) via um app-qr; IndexedDB outbox with dedup-as-idempotency (documented reliance on UM_DEDUP_ENABLED τ=0.84 + metadata.client_request_id) and the invariant 'a queued fact is never dropped except by explicit user action'; path-traversal tests land first (P1); NO chat UI (vendor apps own mobile chat). MID-BRAINSTORM REFRAME (durable feedback feedback_um_work_memory_not_pim.md): UM is work-context memory, not PIM — added state-of-play view (GET /api/state/:project) as the recall centerpiece; all copy/examples work-context shaped. THEN RESTRUCTURED VERIFICATION-FIRST (user challenge): spec STATUS=HELD with new §0 gate; Phase 0 (unconditional, no code) = verify Claude mobile app (account-level MCP connector via tunnel) + ChatGPT mobile app (Custom GPT actions) for capture/recall on-device; protocol docs/plans/2026-06-11-gap3-phase0-vendor-mobile-verification.md (A1-A5/B1-B4 PASS/BRITTLE/FAIL + qualitative friction notes; needs UM_MCP_WRITE_ENABLED=true + tunnel + connector URL current; marker facts GAP3-P0, cleanup step included). Gate: vendor path solid → PWA cut/shrunk, Gap 3 closes mainly via quickstart-mobile.md + surfaces.md rows; recall-only solid → capture-first companion; broken → full PWA with evidence. Conditional PR staging if PWA proceeds: P1 /app route+flag+traversal tests / P2 shell+pairing+outbox / P3 state-of-play+search / P4 um app-qr+docs+smoke; ships as v1.4.0 (scope = P0 + whatever the gate admits). NEXT ACTION: user runs Phase 0 on their phone; results fill the protocol doc verdict columns; then the gate decision, then (if PWA) spec un-HELD → paired-Opus spec-review-loop → plan doc. ::: PHASE 0 RUN + GATE CLOSED 2026-06-11/12. Phase 0 executed same-day with live rig (local build v1.3.0, Tailscale Funnel, write-mode on, marker fact): the question answered itself at SETUP, before any phone test. Findings (§§1a-1d + §6 of the protocol doc): (1a) Claude.ai's connector dialog is OAuth-only (the documented Bearer field is gone); Claude probed GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp → /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource → /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server → POST /register, all 401'd — UM serves no OAuth and even auth-blocks .well-known/* (public-by-spec); (1b) the README-recommended Custom-GPT 'Import from URL' is broken over any tunnel (auth) AND both the repo yaml and live ?gpt=1 spec emit servers: http://localhost:6335 (openapi.mjs hardcode); (1c) ChatGPT's 'New App' MCP flow is OAuth-only too — DCR/CIMD 'Unavailable' because UM doesn't advertise them — convergent with Claude; (1d) gpt-trimmed spec drift: memory_search description 359>300, memory_delete non-object body → skipped, 7 routes vs README's 4. Legacy Custom GPT (lone bearer door) was created after 5 workarounds but every chat turn died inside ChatGPT's UI with ZERO requests reaching the server; user correctly called scope-drift ('why so deep into Custom GPT when we want a universal MCP solution?') and it was abandoned. Posture bonus: live internet scanner sweeps against the funnel were all 401'd — bearer auth held. GATE: initial recommendation (full PWA + OAuth) was OVERRIDDEN by the user's product concept — UM works behind the scenes; no foreground apps — PWA CUT ENTIRELY (durable memory feedback_um_invisible_infrastructure.md; spec CLOSED as record). OAuth research dispatched + COMPLETE same night → docs/research/2026-06-12-mcp-oauth-vendor-connectors.md (see current_focus for the recommendation). Teardown verified: marker deleted, funnel reset (public probe 000), UM_MCP_WRITE_ENABLED=false + UM_MOUNT_MODE=ro restored, compose down; UM_VAULT_DIR pinned in server/.env kept (real fix). NEXT: OAuth design brainstorm (8 open questions in the research report) → spec+plan pair → paired-Opus review → implement (axis-advancing full flow); then vendor mobile verify+docs; um-tunnel banner/URL bugs already shipped separately as PR #107. ::: OAUTH IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE 2026-06-13 — 5 PRs merged, main @a6fbba0, suite 1171/0/13. #108 PR-1 discovery (well-knowns + WWW-Authenticate breadcrumb + boot validation + dedicated OAuth limiter + 6 Phase-0 openapi defects incl. structuredClone fix for shared-schema mutation + fail-loud gpt-description cap). #110 PR-2 core flow (pkce/scopes/redirects/state-store/consent/throttle/endpoints/verifier; verifier-OR on /mcp; ctx.oauth injection seam; _meta re-auth trigger). #111 PR-3 RFC 7591 DCR. #112 PR-4 CIMD (allowlist-first SSRF-guarded, bounded cache). #113 PR-5 hardening (loopback revocation endpoint+server/bin/oauth-revoke.mjs CLI; redirect_uris length cap on DCR+CIMD; consent+token-grant metrics — closed a real spec §6-item-12 observability gap PR-2 silently missed, caught during PR-5 doc-writing; live flow probe server/test/oauth-flow-probe.mjs gated UM_SMOKE_OAUTH; operator guide docs/oauth.md + README/connector banners). Side-fix #109: um-tunnel test stubs exec cat >/dev/null→exec sleep 5 (EOF'd under CI stdin → macOS installer job red on main since #107). Built subagent-driven from the review-converged plan; every task two-stage-reviewed (spec+quality) with fix loops; revocation got a full adversarial-security pass; each PR a final whole-branch Opus review. Consciously SKIPPED two review-suggested hardenings as redundant/optional (separate registration limiter — already covered by oauthAdmit; streaming CIMD body cap — egress allowlist-restricted). REMAINING = arc steps 2-3, all user-gated: live vendor verification (desk-prep in next_session_start.md) → UM_OAUTH_ENABLED default-ON flip (user's call, post-soak) → full connector-doc rewrite (connecting-claude-ai.md/connecting-chatgpt-desktop.md). v1.4.0 unreleased (ships flag-off). PWA stays cut. ::: PRE-FLIP HOLISTIC SECURITY REVIEW 2026-06-13 — one Opus security agent over the COMPLETE assembled surface (all server/lib/oauth/ + verifier-OR + endpoint-class + consent/token lifecycle as one system; the angle the 5 per-PR reviews structurally couldn't take). VERDICT SHIP-READY (flip-safe): no new CRITICAL/HIGH; positively confirmed consent-inescapability, lifecycle single-use+binding, flag-off inertness, crypto composition (one HMAC key, domain-separated consent. vs csrf. prefixes), no-secret-logging, DoS metering. ONE MEDIUM: the verifier-OR authenticated OAuth tokens on EVERY route, and the REST writes (/api/add|/api/delete|DELETE /api/:id) aren't behind isWriteEnabled() (which gates VAULT-FILE writes, pairs with MOUNT_MODE=rw) — so a consented vendor token could mutate the mem0 store over REST regardless of write-mode (OAuth widened the principal operator→vendor, public-funnel-reachable). The reviewer's first-pass fix (gate REST behind isWriteEnabled) was REJECTED after tracing code — /api/add is a mem0 write hooks+/remember rely on with write-mode off; gating would break capture. CLEAN FIX shipped #114 @099f853: scope OAuth verifier arm to url.pathname==='/mcp' (byte-identical to the MCP route dispatcher → can't lock out a real call); vendors only speak MCP so never need REST; legacy bearer keeps full-surface for machine clients; flipped the integration test that pinned the old over-broad behavior (200 /mcp + 401 /api same token) + docs/oauth.md §8 note. Focused security re-review SHIP (.verify consulted in exactly one place → scoping total). Suite 1171/0/13. ::: LIVE VENDOR VERIFICATION COMPLETE & SUCCESSFUL 2026-06-13 — the arc's core goal proven in production. Connected over the Tailscale Funnel (https://desktop.taile9cf17.ts.net) against a LOCAL-BUILT OAuth image (critical: GHCR :latest is the pre-OAuth v1.3.0, so docker compose MUST use the build override -f docker-compose.build.yml --build, else discovery 404s): Claude.ai web (DCR one-click), Claude mobile (account-level — one connect shares the connector across Claude surfaces via the claude.ai/api/mcp/auth_callback redirect; Gap-3 mobile win confirmed with zero extra setup), and ChatGPT (CIMD — no inbound /oauth/register; the client-doc fetch is server→chatgpt.com outbound). Full flows traced server-side (authorize→consent→token→/mcp 200 ×N). CROSS-VENDOR SHARED MEMORY PROVEN: captured 'velvet mammoth' on Claude → recalled it on ChatGPT via memory_search (score 0.77) → returned correctly. The smoke probe (oauth-flow-probe.mjs) passed 8/8 live first. THREE real findings for the connector-doc rewrite: (a) STALE DISCOVERY CACHE — Claude (likely ChatGPT too) caches the pre-OAuth Phase-0 discovery state; first connect POSTed /register (root) and 401'd; REMOVE+RE-ADD the connector forces fresh discovery → /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server → /oauth/register → success. (b) CHATGPT PROACTIVENESS — ChatGPT hallucinates ('ai 2.0') instead of calling memory_search unless explicitly told to use the connector OR given the um-tunnel routing rubric in its custom instructions; Claude recalls proactively because its hook injects the rubric. (c) /.well-known/openid-configuration → 401 (we serve RFC 8414 not OIDC) is tolerated by both vendors (harmless; minor polish = serve it or 404 it). Also fixed live: the ~/.um/auth-token mirror had DRIFTED from server/.env's UM_AUTH_TOKEN (masked because loopback clients bypass auth; the consent gate is the first real check) — re-synced. Interim UX shipped: PR #116 (consent token field autocomplete=current-password → password managers can save it). REMAINING arc work: connector-doc rewrite (connecting-claude-ai.md / connecting-chatgpt-desktop.md, now armed with real vendor-UI behavior + findings a/b/c) and the default-ON flip (user's, post-soak). Banked next ARC after docs: social login ([[project_social_login_next_arc]]).

deliverables.title: Social login — GitHub on the OAuth consent gate (Gap-4 bridge)
deliverables.notes: Banked 2026-06-13 (user-approved), DESIGN COMPLETE 2026-06-14 / IMPL PENDING (fresh session). Full design flow: brainstorm (superpowers) → spec docs/plans/2026-06-14-social-login-spec.md (4-round paired-Opus spec-review-loop, CONVERGED, 8 blockers; headline: token sub is the hardcoded literal owner, so wiring identity in is net-new + the token-issue path is in-scope) → plan docs/plans/2026-06-14-social-login-plan.md (2-round paired-Opus, CONVERGED, 5 blockers, corrections A–K appended = authoritative, supersede task text on conflict). Review logs: .claude/reviews/2026-06-14-social-login-{spec,plan}-2026-06-14/. Design: provider-agnostic IdpAdapter seam — server/lib/oauth/idp/{config,registry,github,policy}.mjs — reusing consent cookie/CSRF/state-store; ONE env-gated /oauth/idp/ prefix row in endpoint-class.mjs (kept pure) + request-time registry dispatch; GitHub-only now (plain OAuth2, no id_token → hand-rolled, no new dep), Google later additive (interface OIDC-ready: opaque credentials + optional nonce); operator pinned by UM_OAUTH_OPERATOR_GITHUB (numeric id preferred), canonical sub=github:<id> stamped on ALL completion paths (one operator = one namespace at Gap-4); token-paste stays break-glass; inert unless UM_OAUTH_ENABLED + GitHub trio configured. Remaining: subagent-driven impl, ~15 TDD tasks / 3 PRs (PR1 inert seam → PR2 round-trip → PR3 hardening+docs) via superpowers:subagent-driven-development; suite 1171/0/13 stays green. ::: SHIPPED 2026-06-14 — 3 PRs squash-merged to main, suite 1235/0/13 (1171 baseline + 64 new). PR1 #118 @ae71d45 (inert seam: idp/{config,registry,github,policy}.mjs + validateOAuthConfig trio-or-nothing + idpConfigWarning + .env.example). PR2 #119 @f42b6e3 (round-trip: putIdpState/consumeIdpState single-use/provider-bound/capped; peekPending; completeAllowedAuthorization + both 'owner' literals→threaded sub; shared verifyOrigin; handleIdpLogin + handleIdpCallback + dedicated callbackThrottle; consent GitHub button + token-fallback details; /oauth/idp/ endpoint-class row + request dispatch; um_oauth_idp_total + consent method label; ctx.oauth bootstrap wires registry/operatorPolicy/callbackThrottle). PR3 #120 @684b860 (hardening: ?error provider-denial + id>0 gate + GitHub-credential log redaction; negative/security suite: replay/expiry, bidirectional throttle separation, fallback-integrity, presence-cookie-sub, secret-no-leak; docs/oauth.md section-3 setup + metrics table + connector cross-links). Subagent-driven; per-task spec+quality reviews + per-PR Opus review each + a whole-arc coherence pass (OIDC-ready seam, canonical sub=github:<id> on all paths, break-glass preserved, no dangling seams). Ships flag-off/inert; v1.4.0 unreleased (release ceremony + default-ON flip = USER's). Live GitHub verification (real OAuth App + human login) later/user-gated. Single-operator now; per-user vaults stay Gap-4 (the sub seam is the bridge). ::: POST-MERGE 2026-06-14 — coding-pillars gate over 0d5eaf8..684b860 = production code clean against all 5 pillars (4 couplings verified); 2 test-quality nits → PR #121 @254a845 (test-only: distinct secret-leak fixture + idp-callback authz-expiry coverage). LIVE GitHub verification PASSED end-to-end vs real GitHub (sub=github:68965162; um_oauth_idp_total{success}; consent{method=idp,allow}; forged-state→400; throwaway scratch vault, real vault untouched). RELEASED in v1.4.0 — see the v1.4.0-release deliverable.

deliverables.title: v1.4.0 release — coding-pillars gate + live GitHub verify + tag + GHCR + GH release
deliverables.notes: Closed out the OAuth (Gap-3) + social-login arcs into a tagged release after three gates. (1) CODING-PILLARS gate: named skill over the merged arc diff 0d5eaf8..684b860 → production code CLEAN against all 5 pillars (4 cross-module couplings verified: takePending live-record semantics; the dedicated OAuth limiter rpm:30/burst:10 covers /oauth/idp/* so endpoint-class correctly skips the shared limiter; policy.allow is test-exercised not dead; setCookie in scope at the refactored allow path). Only 2 test-quality nits → PR #121 @254a845 (test-only): brittle 3-char 'sec' secret-leak fixture → distinctive >=16-char sentinel (false-FAIL risk; strengthens the assertion); idp-callback 'state-live-but-pending-expired' branch coverage (peekPending→400). Suite 1235→1236/0/13. (2) LIVE GitHub verification end-to-end vs REAL GitHub: real OAuth App + human login over the Tailscale Funnel, against a throwaway scratch vault (real vault + qdrant untouched) via a non-invasive docker-compose override (server/.env never mutated for the test). Evidence: consent page rendered 'Continue with GitHub'; callback verified the operator; minted token sub=github:68965162 (canonical, not the owner fallback); metrics um_oauth_idp_total{provider=github,outcome=success} + um_oauth_consent_total{method=idp,outcome=allow} + um_mcp_auth_branch_total{branch=oauth}; authenticated /mcp tools/list→200; adversarial forged-state callback probe→400; rig fully torn down after. (3) docs tightened — docs/oauth.md §0 'which path do you need?' decision table separating the minimal vendor path (one HTTPS URL + UM_OAUTH_ENABLED=true + one token paste) from optional add-ons (custom domain, social login) and the no-OAuth Claude Code path; self-hosted vs VPS framed as an uptime trade-off, not extra steps. RELEASE: PR #122 @7e052d3 (version 1.3.0→1.4.0 via version.mjs single-source + claude-code plugin manifest gated by version-consistency.test.mjs + actions-trimmed.yaml regen + CHANGELOG [1.4.0] + MIGRATION v1.3→v1.4; npm version also corrected a package-lock root frozen at 1.0.0 since v1.0.0) → CI green (build+smoke + ubuntu/macos installers) → squash-merge → annotated tag v1.4.0 → release.yml built+pushed GHCR multi-arch ghcr.io/goldenwo/universal-memory-server:{1.4.0,1.4,latest} (amd64+arm64, 3m26s) → GH Release 'v1.4.0 — OAuth 2.1 connector auth + GitHub social login' created + marked Latest. Follow-up RESOLVED 2026-06-14 in PR #123 @f75ec60 (docs-only): /metrics is loopback-gated (host curl 404s under Docker); live investigation found the gate works as designed AND metricsPolicy already supports a least-privilege non-loopback scrape (UM_METRICS_LOOPBACK_ONLY=false + bearer), just undocumented → documented 3 scrape paths in docs/oauth.md §8 + UM_METRICS_* flags in .env.example, no code change. Also FIXED in PR #124 @4e5dec4: um_mcp_auth_branch_total{branch=legacy} over-counted (any legacy-token request, not just /mcp) — guarded with pathname==='/mcp' + 2 delta tests; main suite now 1238/0/13. NEXT natural arc = Gap-4 per-user vaults (the sub=github:<id> seam is the bridge); Gap-3 default-ON flip stays the user's, post-soak (don't surface).
